content: Paper on Pulse published in Journal of Network and Computer Applications journal, exploring the synergistic integration of IoT, AI, and 6G.
Paper on SIREN published in IEEE Internet of Things journal, exploring the synergistic integration of IoT, AI, and 6G.
🏆 Achievement Unlocked: Awarded 3,500 node hours on the Leonardo BOOSTER supercomputer via EuroHPC Benchmark Access Call (EHPC-BEN-2025B12-013)!
Two papers accepted at IEEE/ACM UCC 2025: Splitwise on collaborative edge-cloud inference for LLMs and FedGuard on fault-tolerant federated learning.
Paper on HealthCare 5.0 published in Internet of Things journal, exploring the synergistic integration of IoT, AI, and 6G.
